lessons.title: Get started with generative AI in Azure Database for PostgreSQL
lessons.content_md:
Use generative AI in Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/get-started-generative-ai-azure-database-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Enable semantic search in Azure Database for PostgreSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn to enable semantic search in Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enable-semantic-search-azure-database-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Enable semantic search in Azure Database for PostgreSQL

lessons.title: Integrate AI Services to enrich your applications with intelligent features in Azure Database for PostgreSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn to integrate Azure AI Services with Azure Database for PostgreSQL to add intelligent features like summarization and sentiment analysis.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/integrate-ai-services-enrich-azure-database-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Integrate AI Services to enrich your applications with intelligent features in Azure Database for PostgreSQL

lessons.title: Build RAG applications with Azure Database for PostgreSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) on Azure Database for PostgreSQL using Azure AI and vector (pgvector) extensions. Build a Python-based application and explore advanced options like GraphRAG.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/build-rag-applications-azure-database-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build RAG applications with Azure Database for PostgreSQL

lessons.title: Implement generative AI agents with Azure Database for PostgreSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn to build, integrate, and evaluate generative AI agents using Azure Database for PostgreSQL.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-generative-ai-agents-azure-postgresql/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement generative AI agents with Azure Database for PostgreSQL

lessons.title: Develop PostgreSQL solutions in Visual Studio Code with the PostgreSQL extension and GitHub Copilot
lessons.content_md:
Learn how GitHub Copilot and the PostgreSQL extension improve SQL development workflows in Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/enhance-postgresql-development-github-copilot-visual-studio-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop PostgreSQL solutions in Visual Studio Code with the PostgreSQL extension and GitHub Copilot

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build AI Apps with Azure Database for PostgreSQL
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build AI Apps with Azure Database for PostgreSQL**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
